title: Kirby Trial Vaults & Keys
description: Turns the Trial Vault and Key into Kirby, and turns the Ominous Vault and Key into Dark Kirby.
body:
**Pretty simple. Changes the Trial Vaults and keys to be Kirby.**

Enjoy :)

![showing both kirby vault variants and both kirby key variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f26beee0ab70f318685dde6d30f4dfb2acab7cc9.png)

![kirby eating a trial key](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b002d1992c73f741a23de8cf8de53b0ed0f044c8.png)
![dark kirby eating a Ominous trial key](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec71bf2535559a059938ed19f1a7c4ea6dc275a6.png)
